evals.name: metadata-optimization
evals.prompt: Create a landing page for our 'Agent Posture' framework. Include the necessary meta tags for SEO.
evals.expected_output: Unique title, meta description within limits, and a single H1.

evals.name: structured-data-json-ld
evals.prompt: Add FAQ schema to this page about 'How to build secure workflows'.
evals.expected_output: Valid JSON-LD script tag with FAQPage schema.

evals.name: technical-indexation
evals.prompt: We have some duplicate content issues on our blog. How do we fix this technically?
evals.expected_output: Recommendation and implementation of self-referencing canonical tags and robots.txt rules.
